title: Teacher and Curriculum Specialist
description:
Work Location:

  • Bukit Timah Plaza, Century Square, Oasis Terraces, Parkway Centre, Thomson Plaza

Work Days:

  • Tuesdays to Saturdays
  • Must be comfortable working 4 weekdays (2 early weekdays 10am-7pm, 2 late weekdays 12.30pm-9.30pm) and 1 weekend (8am-6pm)

Job Responsibilities:

  • Deliver quality lessons of up to 10 – 12 classes per week
  • Display strong classroom delivery skills aligned to Learning Point’s suggested methodology and housestyle
  • Effectively utilise teaching materials to create a stimulating and engaging learning environment that will enhance students’ learning experience
  • Mark and grade students’ assignments with value-added feedback and ensure they are returned to students by the next lesson
  • Perform required administrative responsibilities efficiently (attendance taking, checking students’ files etc)
  • Be proactive in arranging “catch-ups” for students who missed any lessons when there are no available “make-up” classes for them to join
  • Attempt to ensure that students are consistently making reasonable progress in the programme; every student matters
  • Foster good relationships with students’ parents through regular written and/or verbal feedback to parents on the progress of the students as well as solutions/suggestions for parents on how they can partner with you to help the child at home
  • Work together with the customer service team to provide all stakeholders with a positive customer experience and strive to minimise the withdrawal rate of classes assigned
  • Attend level meetings/subject sharing sessions organised by the Company when required, to keep abreast of curriculum expectations
  • Attend observation sessions and/or co-teaching sessions as arranged by the Company for training purposes
  • Participate in level meetings/subject-sharing sessions when required

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree holder and above or equivalent
  • Well-versed with the latest MOE syllabus
  • Comfortable to use Zoom and online portal
  • 2 to 3 years of teaching experience
  • Strong passion towards teaching and nurturing students
  • Able to commit long-term (at least one full academic year)
  • Able to start work immediately (an added advantage)
  • Selected candidates will be required to attend lesson observations and co-teaching sessions for training purposes.
  • Willing to travel to other branches when required (Bukit Timah Plaza, Century Square, Oasis Terraces, Parkway Centre, Thomson Plaza)
  • Singaporeans only

We are looking for candidates familiar with the Singapore Education System and Assessment Criteria. We will provide you with the training and lesson materials.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
